headings.text: Kaleidescape Strato V: Commercial Theater Quality Films at Home
Access to the Kaleidescape Movie Store
Why Choose the Kaleidescape Strato V?

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingKaleidescape Strato VPosted on December 11, 2024Kaleidescape Strato V: Commercial Theater Quality Films at HomeThe Kaleidescape Strato V represents a breakthrough in home cinema technology, delivering unmatched 4K playback, lossless audio, and scalability that caters to both standalone setups and expansive home entertainment systems. As the next generation of movie players, the Strato V stands as the pinnacle of cinematic performance, offering an immersive viewing experience for audiophiles and cinephiles alike. Here's a comprehensive look at what sets this device apart.‍‍Unparalleled Picture QualityThe Kaleidescape Strato V is built for those who demand uncompromising video performance. It supports 4K Ultra HD resolution with Dolby Vision, HDR10, and SDR, ensuring vibrant colors and deep contrast for any content. Even lower-resolution HD and SD content benefits from its exceptional upscaling technology, delivering near-4K quality.Unlike streaming services that rely on internet bandwidth, the Strato V downloads movies with bitrates up to 100 Mbps to local storage. This ensures a flawless, uninterrupted playback experience, free from buffering or compression artifacts common in streaming.Immersive Audio for Every DetailAudio enthusiasts will appreciate the Strato V's support for lossless audio formats. It passes or decodes high-quality audio for downstream systems, including Dolby Atmos, DTS:X, Dolby TrueHD, and DTS-HD Master Audio, among others. Whether it's clear dialogue or immersive surround effects, the Strato V elevates audio clarity and realism for a theater-like experience at home.‍‍A Standalone or Scalable SolutionThe Strato V functions seamlessly as a standalone system. It features an internal 960GB solid-state drive (SSD), capable of storing approximately 10 reference-quality 4K movies. With its streamlined interface, it is designed for quick navigation of smaller movie libraries.For larger collections or multi-room setups, the Strato V integrates effortlessly with Kaleidescape's Terra Prime movie servers, enabling users to scale their system to hold thousands of movies across multiple players. Grouping with a server also unlocks Kaleidescape’s iconic covers view and advanced navigation features.Efficiency and ConvenienceThe Strato V is designed to download movies quickly, completing a Kaleidescape 4K movie download in as little as 10 minutes over a gigabit Ethernet connection, even while playing other content. After viewing, downloaded movies are automatically flagged for deletion after 48 hours, optimizing storage space for new titles.Control and IntegrationThe Strato V is as intuitive as it is powerful. Users can control the device through Kaleidescape's mobile app, its IR remote, or a variety of home automation systems, including Crestro,Control4, Savant, and Josh.ai. These options make it a versatile addition to any smart home.‍‍Access to the Kaleidescape Movie StoreThe Strato V unlocks exclusive access to the Kaleidescape Movie Store, the only digital movie store offering lossless audio and full reference video quality. Users can buy or rent thousands of titles through the mobile app or a web browser. Premium features like early release titles andpremium rentals—often available while movies are still in theaters—add even more value to this premium platform.‍Design and InstallationThe compact dimensions of the Strato V (7.87" W x 1.52" H x 10.0" D) and lightweight design (4.2 lbs) make it easy to install in a variety of configurations. Kaleidescape offers rack shelves for mounting in AV racks and wall-mount solutions for discrete placement behind TVs. The device's silent operation ensures it remains unobtrusive, even in the quietest of environments.echnical SpecificationsThe Strato V is built with cutting-edge hardware to ensure top-tier performance:Video Output: HDMI 2.1 with support for resolutions up to 2160p60 and color spaces like BT.2020.Audio Outputs: HDMI (multichannel and spatial audio), along with coaxial RCA and TOS-link options.Storage: Internal 960GB SSD, expandable with Terra Prime servers.Networking: Gigabit Ethernet for high-speed downloads.Power Efficiency: Max consumption of 9W, with low standby power options.‍‍Why Choose the Kaleidescape Strato V?The Kaleidescape Strato V is more than a movie player—it’s a gateway to a premium cinema experience at home. With its superior video and audio quality, fast downloads, and seamless integration into larger systems, it caters to both casual movie enthusiasts and dedicated audiophiles. Whether as a standalone player or part of a multi-room setup, the Strato V redefines home entertainment.For those who demand the best, the Kaleidescape Strato V delivers. Experience cinematic perfection in every frame and every sound.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
